body: r_c knows that the other cats expect {PRONOUN/r_c/object} to be beside {PRONOUN/r_c/self} with grief, but {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} instead {VERB/r_c/feel/feels}… free. m_c was r_c’s mate, yes, but r_c always felt as though {PRONOUN/r_c/subject} could never quite relax around {PRONOUN/m_c/object}. Maybe things will be different now.
